title: Kanakachalapathi Temple, Kanakagiri
tagline: Kanakachalapathi Temple, Kanakagiri — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: The Kanakachalapathi temple is a 16th-century Hindu temple dedicated to the god Vishnu.
overview.description: The Kanakachalapathi temple is a 16th-century Hindu temple dedicated to the god Vishnu. It is located in the town of Kanakagiri, in the Gangavathi taluk of Koppal district in the Karnataka state, India. Kanakagiri, known in ancient times as "Swarnagiri" (lit, "Hill of Gold") is about 3 km from the district headquarters Koppal city, 380 km north of Bangalore city and 200 km east of Belagavi city. Kanakagiri is known to get its present name from Kanaka Muni, a Hindu saint who performed penance there.

topPlaces.name: Kanakagiri
topPlaces.description: Kanakagiri (also known as Suvarnagiri) is a town in Karnataka state of India. It was a provincial capital of the Mauryan Empire and later became the capital of the Nayaka dynasty who were the Palegars (feudatory) of the Vijayanagara Empire.

topPlaces.name: Advibhavi (Kushtagi)
topPlaces.description: Advibhavi (Kushtagi) is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Kushtagi taluk of Koppal district in Karnataka.

items.note: Kanakagiri (also known as Suvarnagiri) is a town in Karnataka state of India. It was a provincial capital of the Mauryan Empire and later became the capital of the Nayaka dynasty who were the Palegars (feudatory) of the Vijayanagara Empire.
Advibhavi (Kushtagi) is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Kushtagi taluk of Koppal district in Karnataka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kanakachalapathi Temple, Kanakagiri?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kanakachalapathi Temple, Kanakagiri is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kanakachalapathi Temple, Kanakagiri?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Bellary Airport (67 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (137 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kanakachalapathi Temple, Kanakagiri?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kanakachalapathi Temple, Kanakagiri at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kanakachalapathi Temple, Kanakagiri?
faq.a: Stays in Kanakachalapathi Temple, Kanakagiri start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kanakachalapathi Temple, Kanakagiri?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kanakagiri, Advibhavi (Kushtagi).
